messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document. Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text. Section metadata: { "node_id": "0024", "title": "非头部厂商唯一生存路径——在极度细分的赛道中做到绝对精准与创新", "page_index": 9, "page_range": "9-1" } Section text: ## 非头部厂商唯一生存路径——在极度细分的赛道中做到绝对精准与创新 2025年新入围榜单的4款游戏，它们的成功皆在于精准地捕捉并满足了某个特定用户群体未被充分满足的核心需求，并在玩法融合或题材表现上形成了足够的差异化壁垒。这些产品象征着市场在创新上的“毛细血管”仍未完全堵塞，行业仍保留着必要的多样性与活力；但这种模式难以驱动市场大盘增长，更多是巨头格局下的补充与点缀。 2024年
排名icon游戏名排名icon游戏名厂商2025年流水预估(亿元)
1王者荣耀←1王者荣耀腾讯172.34
2和平精英←2和平精英腾讯86.84
3地下城与勇士:起源←3地下城与勇士:起源腾讯50.98
4金铲铲之战4无尽冬日点点互动47.10
5梦幻西游5三角洲行动腾讯45.68
6英雄联盟手游6金铲铲之战腾讯38.48
7穿越火线7梦幻西游网易37.90
8逆水寒8穿越火线腾讯31.41
9无尽冬日9火影忍者腾讯22.02
10捕鱼大作战10英雄联盟手游腾讯20.73
11三国志·战略版11第五人格网易16.41
12原神12恋与深空叠纸游戏16.09
13崩坏:星穹铁道13原神米哈游14.73
14火影忍者14向僵尸开炮海南畅梦科技14.53
15第五人格15捕鱼大作战途游游戏13.73
来源：中国移动游戏产品收入是综合了点点数据、企业财报、专家访谈，根据点点数据统计模型核算所得。

message.content:
This section provides retrieval-ready information to answer questions regarding:
- **Topics:** Survival strategies for non-leading mobile game developers, niche market targeting, product differentiation, and Chinese mobile game market revenue trends.
- **Entities:** Top-grossing mobile games (e.g., 王者荣耀, 和平精英, 无尽冬日, 恋与深空, 向僵尸开炮), publishers/developers (腾讯, 网易, 点点互动, 叠纸游戏, 米哈游, 海南畅梦科技, 途游游戏), and data providers (点点数据).
- **Dates:** 2024 and 2025.
- **Claims:** Non-top-tier developers can only survive by targeting highly segmented niches with precise innovation. Four newly ranked games in 2025 succeeded by fulfilling unmet core user needs and establishing gameplay/theme differentiation. This niche-driven model sustains market diversity but cannot drive overall market growth, functioning mainly as a supplement to the giant-dominated industry structure.
- **Tables & Metrics:** A comparative table ranking the top 15 Chinese mobile games by revenue for 2024 vs. 2025. Provides 2025 estimated revenue figures (in 亿元) for each title (range: 13.73–172.34), publisher names, and year-over-year rank positions.
- **Evidence Types:** Industry ranking data, revenue estimates calculated via a statistical model, corporate financial reports, and expert interviews.
(Definitions, procedures, and figures are not present in this section.)
